hooks.command: jq -rn '{systemMessage: "Plugins enabled: superpowers, frontend-slides. If `/plugin list` is missing either, run: `/plugin install superpowers@claude-plugins-official` and/or `/plugin marketplace add zarazhangrui/frontend-slides && /plugin install frontend-slides@frontend-slides`. Reminder: always ask the user before invoking any skill — use only when explicitly told to."}'

jq -rn '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "ask", permissionDecisionReason: "Ask the user for explicit approval before invoking this skill. The user wants to confirm every skill use and only run skills when explicitly told to."}}'
